segments.text: First listen and then answer the following question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答下面的问题。

segments.text: What happened to the vasa almost immediately after she was launched?

translations.zh-Hans: “瓦萨号”下水后几乎立刻发生了什么？

segments.text: From the 17th century empire of Sweden, the story of a galleon that sank at the start of her maiden voyage in 1628 must be one of the strangest tales of the sea.

translations.zh-Hans: 在17世纪的瑞典帝国，一艘大帆船于1628年处女航伊始便沉没的故事，堪称最离奇的海上传说之一。

segments.text: For nearly three and a half centuries, she lay at the bottom of Stockholm harbor until her discovery in 1956.

translations.zh-Hans: 它在斯德哥尔摩港底沉睡了近三个半世纪，直到1956年才被发现。

segments.text: This was the vasa, royal flagship of the great imperial fleet.

translations.zh-Hans: 这就是庞大帝国舰队的皇家旗舰“瓦萨号”。

segments.text: King Gustavus Adolphus, the northern hurricane, then at the height of his military success in the Thirty Years' War, had dictated her measurements and armament.

translations.zh-Hans: 当时在三十年战争中军功鼎盛、号称“北方飓风”的古斯塔夫·阿道夫国王，亲自规定了它的尺寸和武备。

segments.text: Triple gun decks mounted 64 bronze cannon.

translations.zh-Hans: 三层炮甲板装有64门青铜炮。

segments.text: She was intended to play a leading role in the growing might of Sweden.

translations.zh-Hans: 它原本要在瑞典日益强盛的国力中扮演主角。

segments.text: As she was prepared for her maiden voyage on August 10th, 1628, Stockholm was in a ferment.

translations.zh-Hans: 1628年8月10日，它准备处女航时，整个斯德哥尔摩都沸腾了。

segments.text: From the Skepsbran and surrounding islands, the people watched this thing of beauty begin to spread her sails and catch the wind.

translations.zh-Hans: 人们从谢普斯布伦码头和周围岛屿上观看这件美丽杰作张帆迎风。

segments.text: They had labored for three years to produce this floating work of art.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们辛苦三年才造出这件漂浮的艺术品。

segments.text: She was more richly carved and ornamented than any previous ship.

translations.zh-Hans: 它的雕刻和装饰比以往任何船都更加华丽。

segments.text: The high stern castle was a riot of carved gods, demons, knights, kings, warriors, mermaids, cherubs, and zamorphic animal shapes ablaze with red and gold and blue.

translations.zh-Hans: 高耸的艉楼布满雕刻的神祇、恶魔、骑士、国王、武士、美人鱼、小天使和兽形图案，红、金、蓝三色灿烂夺目。

segments.text: Symbols of courage, power, and cruelty were portrayed to stir the imaginations of the superstitious sailors of the day.

translations.zh-Hans: 勇气、权力和残酷的象征被刻画出来，以激发当时迷信水手的想象。

segments.text: Then the cannons of the anchored warships thundered a salute to which the vasa fired in reply.

translations.zh-Hans: 接着，停泊的军舰鸣炮致敬，“瓦萨号”也开炮回礼。

segments.text: As she emerged from her drifting cloud of gun smoke, with the water churned to foam beneath her bow, her flags flying, pennants waving, filling in the breeze, and the red and gold of her

translations.zh-Hans: 它从弥漫的炮烟中驶出，船首下浪花翻涌，旗帜飞扬，三角旗迎风飘舞，红金相间的

segments.text: superstructure ablaze with color.

translations.zh-Hans: 上层建筑色彩绚烂。

segments.text: She presented a more majestic spectacle than Stockholmers had ever seen before.

translations.zh-Hans: 它展现出的雄伟景象，是斯德哥尔摩人前所未见的。

segments.text: All gun ports were open, and the muzzles peeped wickedly from them.

translations.zh-Hans: 所有炮门都敞开着，炮口从中阴森地探出。

segments.text: As the wind freshened, there came a sudden squall, and the ship made a strange movement listing to port.

translations.zh-Hans: 风势增强，突然一阵狂风袭来，船身怪异地向左舷倾斜。

segments.text: The ordnance officer ordered all the port cannon to be heaved to starboard to counteract the list, but the steepening angle of the decks increased.

translations.zh-Hans: 军械官命令把左舷火炮全部拉到右舷以抵消倾斜，但甲板的倾角仍越来越大。

segments.text: Then the sound of rumbling thunder reached the watchers on the shore, as cargo, ballast, ammunition, and four hundred people went sliding and crashing down to the port side of the steeply listing ship.

translations.zh-Hans: 随后岸上的观众听见雷鸣般的滚动声，货物、压舱物、弹药和400个人一齐滑落、撞向严重倾斜船只的左舷。

segments.text: The lower gun ports were now below water, and the inrush sealed the ship's fate.

translations.zh-Hans: 下层炮门此时已没入水下，涌入的海水决定了船的命运。

segments.text: In that first glorious hour, the mighty vasa, which was intended to rule the Baltic, sank with all flags flying, in the harbor of her birth.

translations.zh-Hans: 就在这荣耀的第一个小时里，原本要称霸波罗的海的强大“瓦萨号”旗帜飘扬着沉没在它诞生的港湾。
